name: wealthflow
description: WealthFlow Elite Financial System v6.7 — Sri Lankan personal finance management with 18-engine multi-vision AI consensus (Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Grok 2, Pixtral, Llama 3.2 Vision, Qwen 2.5-VL, Phi-3 Vision + Ollama + Groq + OCR.space), TensorFlow.js image enhancement, adaptive PDF rendering, intelligent recurring-bill detection, multi-lingual AI advisor with universal knowledge, beautiful PIN-gated memory controls, and 3D cash flow visualization.
